response:
<<THE RESEARCH ASSISTANT IS DESIGNING AN EXPERIMENT TO TEST THE EFFECTIVENESS OF A NEW DRUG ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE>>  

1. **DERIVE THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS (MLEs) FOR THE PARAMETERS MU_X, MU_Y, SIGMA_X2, SIGMA_Y2, AND SIGMA_XY GIVEN THE DATA**  

THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE AS FOLLOWS:  
[THE MLE FOR MU_X IS THE SAMPLE MEAN OF THE PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES]  
[THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS THE SAMPLE MEAN OF THE POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES]  
[THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X2 IS THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF THE PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES]  
[THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y2 IS THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF THE POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES]  
[THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X_i AND Y_i]  

2. **TO TEST THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE, FORMULATE AND CONDUCT A HYPOTHESIS TEST USING THE DERIVED MLEs**  

THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS THAT THE DRUG HAS NO EFFECT ON BLOOD PRESSURE, [H0: MU_Y = MU_X]  
THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS THAT THE DRUG DOES HAVE AN EFFECT ON BLOOD PRESSURE, [H1: MU_Y ≠ MU_X]  
THE TEST STATISTIC IS THE T-SAMPLE TEST FOR MEANS, [T = (MU_Y - MU_X) / SE]  
THE SE IS THE STANDARD ERROR OF THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN MEANS, [SE = sqrt(SIGMA_X2 / n + SIGMA_Y2 / n)]  
THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS THAT IF THE ABSOLUTE VALUE OF THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE critical value from the t-distribution with [df = n - 1] degrees of freedom, [REJECT H0]  
THE SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL IS 0.05, [ALPHA = 0.05]  
THE REJECTION REGION IS THE REGION WHERE THE ABSOLUTE VALUE OF THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE critical value, [REJECT H0 IF |
